card.title: Longevity
card.description: Designed to support how you age—starting at the cellular level. Longevity combines antioxidant nutrients like CoQ10, quercetin, and astaxanthin with targeted botanicals including turmeric, Japanese knotweed, and Arjuna bark. This formula supports pathways tied to energy, oxidative balance, and mitochondrial health.

benefits.title: Support Cellular Function
benefits.description: Formulated with nutrients that play a role in mitochondrial energy production and long- term cellular health.

benefits.title: Protect Against Oxidative Stress
benefits.description: Features antioxidant-rich compounds like astaxanthin, quercetin, and CoQ10 to help buffer the effects of daily stressors.

benefits.title: Promote Healthy Aging
benefits.description: Includes plant-based extracts traditionally used to support metabolic balance, cardiovascular function, and graceful aging.

faqs.title: Have Questions? We're Here to Help

items.question: What is the best way and time to take the Longevity supplement?
items.answer: You can expect personalized treatment plans, licensed medical support, and continuous follow-up designed around your goals.

items.question: Can I take Longevity with other supplements or medications?
items.answer: Coverage depends on your plan and location. We provide transparent pricing and documentation you can use for reimbursement when eligible.

items.question: Can I see the testing for purity, heavy metals, or the Certificate of Analysis (COA) for this product?
items.answer: Yes, many of our services can be paid using HSA/FSA cards. Eligibility may vary by provider and treatment type.

items.question: What can I expect from Conquer Clinic?
items.answer: Yes, many of our services can be paid using HSA/FSA cards. Eligibility may vary by provider and treatment type.

items.question: Do you accept insurance?
items.answer: At the moment, services and fulfillment are focused on approved U.S. regions where our providers are licensed.

items.question: Can I use my HSA or FSA?
items.answer: No problem. Reach out to our support team and we will help you quickly with any additional questions.
